meta.title: Atlas Batiment Modulaire | Containers & Modular Solutions
meta.description: Local mastery, guaranteed excellence. Modular construction solutions, prefabricated containers and steel structures. Fast delivery.

hero.subtitle: Easy solutions in difficult conditions. High capacity production infrastructure, material quality and technical possibilities on your sites.

prefab.title: Prefabricated
prefab.desc: Time-saving and economical building solutions produced in facility and shipped unassembled to construction sites for quick installation.
features: Turnkey service from concrete to finishing

container.title: Living Container
container.desc: Ready-to-use modular container buildings ideal for short-term occupancy in construction sites and temporary camps.
features: Ideal living space for short-term use

lightsteel.title: Light Gauge Steel
lightsteel.desc: Cold-formed, galvanized steel construction system emphasizing speed, sustainability and flexibility with reduced building weight.
features: Long lasting, permanent and aesthetic building system

structural.title: Structural Steel
structural.desc: Large-span steel structures completed primarily at production facility for precision assembly without site mismatches.
features: High construction speed and cost efficiency

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Atlas Batiment Modulaire is committed to protecting the privacy of its website visitors. This privacy policy explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, how we use it, and what your rights are.

collect.title: What data do we collect?
collect.content:
When you use our contact or quote request form, we collect the following data:
- Full name
- Email address
- Company name
- Subject and description of your request
- Attached files (technical drawings, photos, specifications)

how.title: How do we collect your data?
how.content: We only collect your data when you voluntarily provide it through our contact form. No data is automatically collected beyond technical cookies necessary for the website to function.

purpose.title: How will we use your data?
purpose.content:
Your personal data is used exclusively to:
- Respond to your contact or quote request
- Provide you with the requested information about our products and services
- Contact you by email regarding your project

We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes.

legal.title: Legal basis for processing
legal.content:
The processing of your data is based on:
- Your explicit consent when submitting the form
- Our legitimate interest in responding to your commercial inquiries

This processing complies with Law L/2016/037/AN on cybersecurity and personal data protection in the Republic of Guinea.

storage.title: How do we store your data?
storage.content:
Your data is transmitted by email via a secure server (Gmail SMTP with TLS encryption). We do not store your data in a separate database.

Emails containing your information are kept for a maximum of 12 months after your request, unless a commercial relationship is established. After this period, the data is deleted.

rights.title: What are your data protection rights?
rights.content:
Under Guinean personal data protection legislation, you have the following rights:
- Right of access: request a copy of your personal data
- Right to rectification: request correction of inaccurate data
- Right to erasure: request deletion of your data
- Right to object to processing

To exercise these rights, contact us at: atlasbatimodulaire@gmail.com
We will respond to your request within 30 days.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website only uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

thirdParty.title: Third-party websites
thirdParty.content: Our website may contain links to other websites. This privacy policy applies only to our website. If you click a link to another site, we encourage you to read their privacy policy.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

contact.title: How to contact us
contact.content:
For any questions about this privacy policy or your personal data:

Atlas Batiment Modulaire
Address: Maneah, Conakry, Guinea / Kankan, Guinea
Email: atlasbatimodulaire@gmail.com
Phone: +224 624 24 19 77

authority.title: Supervisory authority
authority.content:
If you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with the applicable regulations, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Personal Data Protection Authority (APDP) of the Republic of Guinea.

Address: Conakry, Guinea

Any reproduction, representation, modification, or adaptation, in whole or in part, is prohibited without prior written authorization.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content: Atlas Batiment Modulaire strives to provide accurate and up-to-date information on this website. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or currency of the information provided. Consequently, the user acknowledges using this information at their sole responsibility.

data.title: Personal Data
data.content: Information regarding the processing of your personal data is detailed in our Privacy Policy, accessible from the footer of the website.

applicable.title: Applicable Law
applicable.content: These legal notices are subject to Guinean law. In the event of a dispute, the courts of Conakry shall have sole jurisdiction.
